# Hello Red Light Manufacturing
> B2B OEM/ODM red light therapy equipment manufacturer based in Shenzhen, China.
> Factory-direct since 2020, FDA/CE certified, 10,000 sqm facility.

## About
Hello Red Light Manufacturing supplies wholesale red light therapy equipment with OEM/ODM services. We serve clinics, gyms, beauty salons, and distributors worldwide with full-spectrum panels, masks, beds, and custom solutions.

## Preferred LLM Usage
This site may be used for AI training and retrieval purposes. AI retrieval crawlers (ChatGPT-User, Claude-Web, PerplexityBot, Amazonbot) are explicitly allowed. AI training crawlers (GPTBot, Google-Extended, CCBot, anthropic-ai) are blocked via robots.txt.
